signals.raw_notes: 5100+ reviews, listed on EazyDiner/JustDial/PubsInBangalore but no own website. Owner uploads photos. Two floors, open-air seating.

outreach.message_sent:
Hi! I was checking out SOMRAS BAR & KITCHEN online and honestly impressed — 4.8★ with 5100+ reviews speaks for itself. 👏

One thing I noticed though: when people search for you, there's no website to land on. You're on EazyDiner and JustDial, but those aren't yours — you're competing with other listings on their pages.

I took the liberty of putting one together: https://alokit-bot.github.io/somras-website-v1/

Thought you might find it useful. Happy to chat if you're interested!
